hero_subtitle: SFTY streamlines the collection, routing, and exception handling of Travel Rule originator data by unifying messages, customer records, and audit evidence into a single operational workflow.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling

trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Travel Rule originator data remains incomplete
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to collect and process consistent originator information for Travel Rule transfers, creating gaps in regulatory workflows. This fragmentation slows review processes and weakens the audit trail needed for defensible compliance decisions.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY links Travel Rule originator information, message routing status, exceptions and review cases into one structured workflow so compliance teams can process data efficiently with full audit traceability.
workflow_title: From originator data to case evidence
workflow_description: SFTY processes Travel Rule originator data through completeness checks, exception handling, case creation, evidence preservation and compliance review workflows.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_description: SFTY organizes Travel Rule originator data, exceptions, cases and audit evidence into one provider-neutral layer for clearer compliance control and operational visibility.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports exchanges managing originator data workflows with controlled provider orchestration, audit-ready evidence and enterprise deployment in regulated compliance environments.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for Travel Rule operations?
faq_1_answer: SFTY connects Travel Rule messages, originator and beneficiary data, routing status, exceptions, cases and evidence into one structured compliance workflow for regulated digital asset businesses.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY handle originator data workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY manages originator data collection by linking Travel Rule messages with customer profiles and wallets, enabling case creation for incomplete or high-risk events within a connected workflow.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve Travel Rule evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves audit-ready evidence including decision logs, Travel Rule message histories, exception records and case documentation to support review readiness and regulatory compliance efforts.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate existing Travel Rule providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY sits above Travel Rule providers, connecting their outputs into cohesive workflows without requiring replacement of existing systems or providers.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace Travel Rule compliance tools?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace Travel Rule compliance tools but enhances their outputs by structuring workflows, cases, decisions and evidence in one operational compliance layer.
final_title: Connect originator data into Travel Rule workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY connects Travel Rule originator data, messages, exceptions and audit evidence into structured compliance cases.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
